fileNodes.name: config.py
fileNodes.summary: Central configuration module defining a Pydantic Settings class that aggregates all environment-driven parameters for the RAG system.

fileNodes.name: audit_logger.py
fileNodes.summary: HIPAA-oriented audit logging for the RAG pipeline, writing structured JSON records of every query event to a rotating log file.

fileNodes.name: icd9_lookup.py
fileNodes.summary: Lazy-loaded in-memory ICD-9 diagnosis code lookup table.

fileNodes.name: orchestrator.py
fileNodes.summary: Top-level RAG query orchestrator routing queries through intent parsing and dispatching to vector or SQL retriever.

fileNodes.name: operations.py
fileNodes.summary: PostgreSQL data-access operations: upsert and fuzzy-match for patients, providers, admissions, and clinical records.

fileNodes.name: schema.py
fileNodes.summary: PostgreSQL schema initialization, connection management, migration runner, and dynamic staging-table/view system.

fileNodes.name: sql_retriever.py
fileNodes.summary: SQL-based retrieval branch: structured entity lookup and LLM text-to-SQL analytical query path.

fileNodes.name: catalog_admin.py
fileNodes.summary: CLI tool for managing the data stream catalog that drives the dynamic SQL query layer.

fileNodes.name: intent_parser.py
fileNodes.summary: Regex-based parser for plain-English clinical queries extracting patient names, providers, dates, ICD codes.

fileNodes.name: llm_client.py
fileNodes.summary: Unified LLM invocation interface dispatching to Ollama or OpenAI based on configuration.

fileNodes.name: query_router.py
fileNodes.summary: Determines retrieval strategy (analytical/SQL-lookup/ICD-10/vector-search) and attaches routing metadata.

fileNodes.name: retriever.py
fileNodes.summary: Full hybrid retrieval pipeline: intent parsing, routing, SQL/vector dispatching, cross-encoder reranking, answer formatting, hallucination grading.

fileNodes.name: main.py
fileNodes.summary: FastAPI application entry point exposing REST endpoints for ingestion, querying, listing, and deletion.

fileNodes.name: ingestion.py
fileNodes.summary: Core document ingestion pipeline processing tabular (CSV/Excel) and unstructured (PDF/TXT/DOCX) files into PostgreSQL and ChromaDB.

fileNodes.name: vectorstore.py
fileNodes.summary: ChromaDB vector collection manager with hybrid BM25+dense semantic search and CRUD operations.
